title: CommandCenterUI standalone bring-up after repo split
description: Operator (hcom #16101) wants /home/home/Projects/CommandCenterUI running as a standalone local UI app for the lab. The project was decoupled from MultiAgentProject during the TASK-079 repo reconciliation and is no longer nested under the repo. app/server.py derived WORKSPACE via a fixed relative-path offset (PROJECT_DIR.parents[1]) from the old nested layout; standalone it resolves to /home/home, so /api/snapshot silently returned empty MAP state. The desktop launcher and README also pointed at a stale Downloads path. Fix workspace resolution (env override + discovery + loud failure), fix launcher and docs, verify live MAP data end to end. Note: first create attempt allocated TASK-001 from an empty post-split map.db and clobbered mirrors; mirrors were git-restored and codex-lab-lema reseeded the DB (see events around 2026-07-02T12:29Z).
acceptance_criteria: server.py resolves the MAP workspace regardless of where CommandCenterUI lives (env override, discovery, loud failure if absent)
CommandCenterUI.desktop Exec path matches the real current location
README reflects the standalone layout accurately
